# 一图秒懂青岛啤酒🍺秒变懂酒达人✅️收藏

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzA3MzAyOTE5Ng==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA3MzAyOTE5Ng==&mid=2247488430&idx=1&sn=563066ad7ae2a9c48b5438938ac64e03&chksm=9e732638ba4e8c27e414ce344a0af4ac3caa2ed0a3ab9729cc17a3cbc6f64a8f7c53fe95f836&scene=90&xtrack=1&req_id=1782304277226080&sessionid=1782304295&subscene=93&clicktime=1782306871&enterid=1782306871&flutter_pos=8&biz_enter_id=4&ranksessionid=1782305433&jumppath=20020_1782306829668,1104_1782306831943,20020_1782306844296,1104_1782306856416&jumppathdepth=4&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004b2b&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=p/aFE2+xDlXGFE+QyYeW9iWJ59h9IkOePSXPR1MBt8l1zRzkFdxoAfjblRE+ZS8C&wx_header=3)

![](attachments/82cc071d9d966b52.jpg)![](attachments/7ffe5cf6fa78bcc7.jpg)![](attachments/32b43cbafe7deafb.jpg)![](attachments/572093a8ced9c044.jpg)

一图秒懂啤酒系列👀之「青岛啤酒」🍺

✔️青岛经典、青岛白啤、青岛1903、青岛纯生、

✔️奥古特、精酿、鲜啤、原浆、高端、棕金……

青岛，中国啤酒界「顶流」🏅

品牌价值连续22年居中国啤酒行业首位🏆

也是很多人的第1口啤酒🍻

1分钟搞懂青岛啤酒💡，看这篇就够啦！

酒蒙子快快码住哦👻~

#啤酒#懂酒帝#青岛啤酒#精酿啤酒#好喝的酒

Close
